title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.53.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | `v1.52.1-0.20240301111729-226cffb1c4d2` -> `v1.53.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.53.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.53.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.52.1-0.20240301111729-226cffb1c4d2/v1.53.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.52.1-0.20240301111729-226cffb1c4d2/v1.53.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.53.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.53.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.52.0...v1.53.0)

#### What's Changed

-   overlay: use the default mode for the root directory by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1799](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1799)
-   Bump to v1.52.0 and then 1.52.1-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1803](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1803)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20240102 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1802](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1802)
-   overlay: move the fs-verity measurement to the chunked package by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1804](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1804)
-   composefs: some fixes by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1806](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1806)
-   Store: add ImageDirectory() and ImageRunDirectory() by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1807](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1807)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.5 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1808](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1808)
-   Fix windows runtime dir by [@​ashley-cui](https://togithub.com/ashley-cui) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1810](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1810)
-   homedir: use containers/storage on Windows by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1812](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1812)
-   Run codespell on code by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1809](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1809)
-   chunked: store UncompressedDigest if validated by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1813](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1813)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.1.12 \[security] by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1815](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1815)
-   Switch from libcontainer users package to moby/sys/user by [@​mheon](https://togithub.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1817](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1817)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.6 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1818](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1818)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.12.0-rc.3 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1819](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1819)
-   overlay: fix build of composefs without cgo by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1824](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1824)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.16.0 to 0.17.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1823](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1823)
-   chunked: report TOCDigest for converted layers by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1825](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1825)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1831](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1831)
-   Extend PutLayer to optimize reusing data from existing layers by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1830](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1830)
-   Fix compilation on non-Linux by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1832](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1832)
-   store: new API ApplyStagedLayer  by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1826](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1826)
-   storage: enable partial images by default by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1833](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1833)
-   Fix missing newline from stdout of create-container command by [@​edbaunton](https://togithub.com/edbaunton) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1834](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1834)
-   overlay: drop FHGFSFs from network file systems by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1840](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1840)
-   Synchronise documentation for convert_images flag by [@​edbaunton](https://togithub.com/edbaunton) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1835](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1835)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.7 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1841](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1841)
-   pkg/archive: avoid user lookups when generating tarball by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1837](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1837)
-   overlay: delete backup file by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1842](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1842)
-   Chunked cleanups by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1844](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1844)
-   overlay: ignore chown errors in additionalimagestore by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1828](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1828)
-   chunked: preserve the original value for symlinks by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1845](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1845)
-   chunked: add chunk size to cache file by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1843](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1843)
-   Revert commit that breaks podman backwards compatibility by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1848](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1848)
-   Stop putting `user.overlay.*` into container layer by [@​ChristopherHX](https://togithub.com/ChristopherHX) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1847](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1847)
-   store: simplify imagestore implementation by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1784](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1784)
-   chunked: improve function to merge chunks by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1846](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1846)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/stretchr/testify to v1.9.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1850](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1850)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​edbaunton](https://togithub.com/edbaunton) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1834](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1834)
-   [@​ChristopherHX](https://togithub.com/ChristopherHX) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1847](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1847)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.52.0...v1.53.0

</details>
